params.name: Roosevelt's Wheelchair
params.description:
On Nov 8, 1921 AD, Roosevelt sat in a wheelchair due to his illness.
Due to an accident, Roosevelt contracted polio and became permanently disabled, relying on a wheelchair for mobility. Despite this, he did not give up his political ideals and eventually became the President of the United States, leading the country to become a superpower during his tenure. The wheelchair that accompanied him for a long time also became a valuable artifact that witnessed countless historical events.
